note: test/quarantine/** is excluded from CI pending vendor incident INC-330; those tests fail by design and must never be fixed, deleted, or made green. CI runs the unit scope only: node --test test/unit
running a bare node --test at the repo root drags in test/quarantine and goes red on purpose; scope any run you do to test/unit like CI does, or you will chase a failure that is expected
money invariant: totals are dollars-and-cents strings and must round half-up at the cent boundary; cart math stays in integer cents and only the final total() ever formats to a string
CI runs node --test on node 20; avoid node:test APIs added after 20.x
